textPlain: I've been using it to create an RSS feed of all the real estate companies websites in my area to get a competitive edge when new properties are being published.Works great
This looks neat. Will try it out and report back.Added to my list of converters: https://www.reddit.com/r/rss/comments/1ntvtb2/rss_converter/
FYI some feed aggregators have their own solution to subscribe to sites without feeds.The one on FreshRSS works great: https://freshrss.github.io/FreshRSS/en/users/11_website_scra...
So any page can turn into an rss feed
